debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G✝ H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ ∅ ⊆ V(G, M)

proof:
refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching of G
      exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp [Set.empty_subset]
failed_attempts:
refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching of G
      simp [Graph.IsMatching]
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp [Set.subset_def]

refine ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · constructor
      · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of E(G)
        exact Set.empty_subset (E(G))
      · -- Prove that the empty set is disjoint from itself (trivially true)
        intro e f he hf hne
        exfalso
        simp_all
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp

refine' ⟨∅, ⟨by simp [Set.empty_subset], _⟩, by simp [Set.empty_subset]⟩
    intro e fe f ff hne
    simp_all [Set.not_mem_empty]
    <;> aesop

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
      exact {
        subset := Set.empty_subset (E G),
        disjoint := fun e f he hf hne => by simp_all
        }
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp [Set.empty_subset]

refine ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching], _⟩
    simp

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · exact IsMatching.empty G
    · simp [Set.empty_subset]

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
      exact ⟨by simp [Set.subset_def], by simp [Set.subset_def]⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp [V, Set.subset_def]

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    apply EmptyIsEmpty.isMatching
    <;> simp_all

haveI := Classical.decEq (Set β)
    refine ⟨∅, ?_⟩
    have h₁ : G.IsMatching ∅ := by
      refine ⟨_, _⟩
      · -- ∅ ⊆ E(G)
        simp [EdgeSet.Subtype]
      · -- Disjointness condition
        intro e f he hf hne
        simp_all [Set.subset_def]
        <;> aesop
    have h₂ : ∅ ⊆ V(G, (∅ : Set β)) := by simp
    exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

have h_main : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ (∅ : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      refine' ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching of G
        refine' ⟨by simp [Set.subset_empty], ?_⟩
        simp_all [IsMatching.disjoint]
      · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
        simp [Set.subset_empty]
    
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩ := h_main
    refine' ⟨M, hM, _⟩
    <;> simp_all [Set.subset_empty]

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    <;> simp [isMatching_empty]
    <;> aesop

refine ⟨∅, _⟩
    have h₁ : G.IsMatching ∅ := by
      exact ⟨Set.empty_subset _, fun _ _ _ _ _ ↦ True.elim⟩
    have h₂ : (∅ : Set α) ⊆ V(G, ∅) := Set.empty_subset _
    exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of the edge set of G
      exact Set.empty_subset _
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of the vertex set of the empty matching
      exact Set.empty_subset _

refine ⟨∅, ⟨_, _⟩, _⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of the edge set
      simp
    · -- Prove that the empty set satisfies the disjoint conditions for a matching
      simp [IsMatching.disjoint]
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of the vertex set of the empty matching
      simp [Set.subset_def]

refine ⟨∅, ⟨by simp, by simp⟩, _⟩
    <;> simp [Set.empty_subset]
    <;> exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩

refine ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · exact ⟨Set.empty_subset _, by simp⟩
    · simp

refine' ⟨∅, _, _⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a matching in G
      exact ⟨Set.empty_subset _, by simp⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of V(G, ∅)
      simp [V]
      <;>
      aesop

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a matching
      exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of the vertices of the empty matching
      simp [V]

refine ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · exact ⟨by simp [Set.empty_subset], by simp⟩
    · simp [Set.empty_subset]

refine ⟨∅, _⟩
    constructor
    · exact ⟨by simp [Set.subset_def], by simp [IsMatching.disjoint]⟩
    · simp [Set.subset_def]

refine ⟨∅, ⟨_, _⟩⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a subset of E(G)
      exact Set.empty_subset _
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a subset of V(G, ∅)
      simp [V]
      <;> aesop

refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact ⟨Set.empty_subset ↑G.E, fun e f _ _ _ => by simp⟩
    · simp
successful_attempts:
refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching of G
      exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp [Set.empty_subset]

have h_main : ∃ (M : Set β), G.IsMatching M ∧ (∅ : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
        refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
        intro e f he hf hne
        simp_all
      · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
        simp
    
    -- Obtain the matching M such that ∅ ⊆ V(G, M)
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hM'⟩ := h_main
    -- Existence of such a matching M proves the goal
    refine ⟨M, hM, ?_⟩
    exact hM'

have h_exists_empty_matching : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ (∅ : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
        constructor
        · -- Subset condition: ∅ ⊆ E(G)
          exact Set.empty_subset _
        · -- Disjointness condition: vacuously true
          intro e f he hf hne
          simp_all
      · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
        exact Set.empty_subset _
    -- Use the above result to conclude that the empty set is independent
    simpa using h_exists_empty_matching

have h_main : ∃ (M : Set β), G.IsMatching M ∧ (∅ : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      refine' ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
        exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩
      · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
        simp
    -- Obtain the matching M from h_main and use it to show ∅ is independent
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hsub⟩ := h_main
    refine' ⟨M, hM, _⟩
    simpa using hsub

refine ⟨∅, ?_, ?_⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a matching
      exact ⟨by simp [Set.empty_subset], fun e f he hf hne ↦ by simp_all⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of any vertex set of a matching
      simp [Set.empty_subset]

refine' ⟨∅, _⟩
    -- We need to show that the empty set is a matching and that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅).
    -- First, the empty set is trivially a subset of any edge set.
    -- Second, we need to verify the disjointness condition, which is vacuously true.
    -- Finally, ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅) is trivially true.
    constructor
    · -- Prove that ∅ is a matching
      refine' ⟨by simp, _⟩
      intro e f he hf hne
      exfalso
      simp_all
    · -- Prove that ∅ ⊆ V(G, ∅)
      simp

refine' ⟨∅, ?_, _⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a matching in G
      exact ⟨by simp [Set.empty_subset], by simp⟩
    · -- Prove that the empty set is a subset of V(G, ∅)
      simp [Set.empty_subset]

have h1 : G.IsMatching ∅ := ⟨by simp [Set.empty_subset], by simp⟩
    exact ⟨∅, h1, by simp⟩

refine' ⟨∅, ?_, by simp⟩
    exact ⟨by simp [Set.Subset], by
      intro e f he hf hne
      exfalso
      simp_all
      ⟩
